form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation when last of 8 at Trentham December 14 over 2100m, 14 len behind Tisse carrying 54kg at $13.70. Previously first up; ninth of 12 at Wanganui August 30 over 1600m, on rain affected going; 8 len behind Knock Off with 54.5kg at $20.80. Definite winning hope.
